_readme: Context Cortex MCP configuration for Claude Code.
Option A (project-level): Save as .mcp.json in your project root.
Option B (global): Merge the 'mcpServers' block into ~/.claude/settings.json.
1. Restart Claude Code (or run /mcp to reload MCP servers).
2. Verify by asking Claude Code to run cortex_system_status.
- Replace /path/to/context-cortex with the actual install path.
- On Windows, use forward slashes: C:/tools/context-cortex/mcp-server.js
- Adjust CORTEX_DB_* env vars to match your PostgreSQL connection.
- CORTEX_CONFIG points to cortex.config.json (optional if env vars are set).
